About us

An ally for organising everyday care

Since 2018, Mimo Senior has helped families, caregivers and care facilities find and organise essential senior care supplies in Panama.

Tell us what you needView products
  • Personal guidance
  • Confirmed quotation
  • Support in Panama

Our story

Solving a need that often arrives with uncertainty and urgency

Buying supplies for an older adult does not always begin with a clear list. Many families are unsure about formats, size charts or quantities. Mimo Senior was created to make that conversation easier and support supply planning.

  • Support for families, caregivers and facilities.
  • Guidance based on the practical situation.
  • Direct confirmation of products and availability.

What guides us

Mission, vision and values

01

Mission

Provide integrated solutions for everyday senior care through essential supplies, personal support and reliable service that makes life easier for those who care.

02

Vision

Become a trusted reference in Panama for families and facilities that need to organise care supplies clearly and humanely.

03

Empathy

We listen to the situation before presenting options.

04

Dignity

We communicate and represent care respectfully.

05

Clarity

We explain differences, measurements and next steps without unnecessary complexity.

06

Trust

We confirm commercial details before completing a purchase.

How we work

Support centred on the need

  1. 1

    Listen

    Understand who it is for, mobility, size and frequency.

  2. 2

    Guide

    Clarify formats, measurements and complementary supplies.

  3. 3

    Confirm

    Validate availability, quantities, delivery and quotation.

  4. 4

    Organise

    Support one-time purchases or flexible recurring planning.

Tell us what you need

We can help organise a one-time purchase, institutional quotation or flexible monthly plan.
